fields.summary: Describes the component swizzle mapping for a Vulkan YCbCr sampler conversion.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`GRVkYcbcrComponents` holds four component swizzle values (`R`, `G`, `B`, `A`) that
control how color components are mapped when performing YCbCr conversion in a Vulkan
pipeline. Each component value is a `VkComponentSwizzle` integer from the Vulkan API.

This struct is used as the `Components` field of
<xref:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrConversionInfo> when configuring external texture sampling
for hardware-decoded video.

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
var components = new GRVkYcbcrComponents
{
    R = 0, // VK_COMPONENT_SWIZZLE_IDENTITY
    G = 0,
    B = 0,
    A = 0,
};
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle for the alpha component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying how the alpha component is sourced.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle for the blue component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying how the blue component is sourced.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all four component swizzle values are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified object.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is a <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> with the same values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The object to compare with this instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle for the green component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying how the green component is sourced.

fields.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
fields.returns: A hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" />.

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> values are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> have equal component swizzle values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents right);

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents" /> values are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> differ in any component swizzle value; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents left, SkiaSharp.GRVkYcbcrComponents right);

fields.summary: Gets or sets the swizzle for the red component.
fields.value: A <c>VkComponentSwizzle</c> value specifying how the red component is sourced.
